div.h1: Benchmark Results: Sparse Set vs Archetype Storage

div.p: Archetype storage optimizes for iteration frequency over structural change speed. In typical games:

ul.li: Structural changes: ~1x/second (spawning/despawning) The 3.3x iteration speedup compounds across hundreds of systems running every frame, while the 5x migration penalty is amortized across infrequent structural changes.

div.p: 3.3x Speedup Archetype storage eliminates sparse array indirection for pure sequential memory access.
5x Slower Migration requires copying ALL entity components between archetype tables.
